nodes.text: Date of birth? November second, two thousand one. Is that — does that match? I always feel like I'm going to blank on my own birthday under pressure.

responses.text: Can you confirm the year again?

nodes.text: Two thousand and one. November second. I was born the month after September eleventh which means my parents had a very stressful year and I try not to bring it up at holidays.
Great. Is there anything else? I'm going to get some throat lozenges if you don't need me here.

responses.text: That's all I need. Go rest.

nodes.text: Thank you. I really hope this kicks in fast.
